text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, on my way back from shopping with
Tokai Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? There's a bunch of people gathering over
there. I wonder what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about the lovely parent and child over
there? Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm not a child!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But, ooh, it's a raffle! Hehe, I'm super good at
those too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This one time, I was on such a winning streak that
I got called a lucky charm!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I got a raffle ticket from the game
shop earlier, so we should give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's crank the spinner together! That's teamwork!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While crossing our fingers for a big prize, the two
of us crank the raffle spinner's handle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! The grand-prize?! Oh my gosh, oh my
gosh, YESSS!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What did I tell you? Am I great or what?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now that's what I'm talking about! Hehe!
Hahaha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio skips around happily. She seems to be
over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now I've just gotta invite someone to come
with me! And of course, there's only one person I
wanna ask!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep, you got it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait, but then again... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Should I really invite Prez? Now that I think about
it, I'm not so sure...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Can I really go to the hot springs with her right
after I made a New Year's wish to take her down?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've got more important things to focus on right
now, and I dunno if Prez would agree to it, either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that as Tokai Teio gets stronger, her way
of thinking has also changed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Can you hold on to this ticket for
now, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This probably isn't the right time to invite anyone.
I wanna wait until after all the Twinkle Series stuff
has calmed down.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Once that time comes, I'll invite the person I can
have the most fun with. That sound good?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a lot! Hopefully by then, I'll be the
undisputed Monarch of the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then the hot spring owner and all the chefs and
stuff will be like, "Whoa! It's the invincible Teio!"
It'll be amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then they'll give me a bunch of sashimi, and put,
like, loads of rubber duckies in my bath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daydreaming of a royal welcome, Tokai Teio is
flooded with motivation as she thinks about all
the fun things the future holds.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Only first? Aww maaan, I wanted the grand -prize! This is pretty good too, though.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Check out how amazing it looks! So juicy and
tender!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. Trainer, I bet you're thinking it's childish
of me to get all excited over a hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But you know what's really childish? Judging people like that! I mean, everyone likes hamburger steak, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So let's eat it together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! We should put a tasty fried egg on
top too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We share the egg-topped steak. Her smile as she
eats is filled with more glee than I've ever seen a
child express.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aww, second-prize? I thought I had it there for a
second. Ah, well. Them's the breaks.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this sure is a lot of carrots, though! I
wonder what I can use them all for...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I know! I can throw a carrot party!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, first I get all my friends together. Then we
chat and play a bunch of games...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then we tell jokes and do acrobatics! And magic
tricks! And quizzes!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Carrots? Oh, right, the carrots. We can eat those
when we get hungry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It seems the carrots are just an afterthought
compared to the party. What she really wants to
do is hang out with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Trainer! Let's get this party started! Ah, this carrot party, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the carrots provided the perfect
excuse for Tokai Teio to have a great time, and
left everyone thoroughly sated.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! One measly carrot? Can't we at least
have two? One for me and my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her protests go unanswered and we only receive
one carrot.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Grr, what a rip-off. Should we at least do
something with it before we eat it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, I know! I'll use it to pose like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hoists the carrot up to the sky.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You get what this pose means?
choice_data_list: That you won the first leg of the Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Noooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It means I'm gonna win the next race too, so I'm
gonna need two carrots!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Soooo... can I have another one? Pretty please?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: No can do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about three? Then I'll do the Triple
Carrot Crown pose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her logic making less sense by the second,
Tokai Teio is ultimately forced to give in and
munch on a single crunchy carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Just tissues?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Where'd all my luck go?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second. Trainer, are you an unlucky
person?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I see. For whatever reason, my luck ran out today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't ever wanna remember this day, so I'll give
these tissues to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For once, Tokai Teio seems depressed. I guess
everyone has their unlucky days.
